subject: Charged twice this month
message: I noticed two identical charges of $49 on my bank statement this month. Both appeared on the same date. Please look into this and fix it immediately.

subject: Payment failed on upgrade
message: Hi, my payment did not go through when I tried to upgrade my plan. No big deal, just wanted to flag it. Can you help me sort this out?

subject: Cannot log into my account
message: I am completely locked out of my account. I tried resetting my password but I am not receiving the reset email. I have checked my spam folder too. Please help.

subject: Demand full refund immediately
message: This is absolutely unacceptable. Your product does not work and I want a full refund immediately. I have been ignored for 3 days. You people are scammers. I will not let this go.

subject: Why is there no dark mode?
message: Why does your dashboard not have a dark mode? Every other tool I use has it. It is really frustrating to use this late at night. This should be a basic feature by now.

subject: Export crashes on large files
message: The export feature crashes sometimes when I try to download large files. It does not always happen. I am using Chrome on Windows 11. The file size is usually above 50MB when it fails.

subject: Filing chargeback and consumer forum complaint
message: I have been waiting 2 weeks for my refund and nobody has responded to my emails. I am going to file a chargeback with my bank and report you to the consumer forum if this is not resolved today.

subject: Refund policy question
message: Hi, I wanted to ask about your refund policy. If I cancel my subscription mid-month, do I get a prorated refund? Just trying to understand before I make a decision.

subject: How do I add team members?
message: I wanted to know how I can add more team members to my workspace. I checked the settings page but could not find the option. Can you guide me?
